'''Lissarkh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]], Lissarkh was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], and received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. After a time, Lissarkh was selected by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] to be his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. After years of training one-on-one with Koon, Lissarkh was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|elevated]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] shortly before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="I87" />
